action.reasoning: Observation: First training (CLIP-L, 2 epochs, weighted sqrt sampler) gave val_macro_f1 0.032 which collapsed to 0.004 epoch 2; eval gave 0.027. Pipeline works. ~84min/epoch is too slow. 6.5h left, 27 iters. Analysis: Need (1) faster training - switch to CLIP ViT-B/16 (3-4x faster) at 224, (2) drop weighted sampling (caused collapse), use standard CE with optional logit-adjusted loss for long-tail, (3) lower LR, cosine schedule, freeze early layers or use lower backbone LR. With ViT-B/16 multi-GPU at bs=256, expect ~20min/epoch, can do 4-5 epochs in ~80min. Decision: Rewrite train.py to use CLIP ViT-B/16, standard sampling, AdamW with low backbone LR, cosine schedule, label smoothing, train 4 epochs, then submit.
